name: GraveSky
description: GraveSky is a fast-paced arcade flier where survival hangs between narrow gaps in a dark, unforgiving sky. Control a vulture in constant flight and guide it through tight spaces between towering bars—one wrong move and the run ends. Each tap keeps the vulture airborne, demanding perfect rhythm and sharp focus as obstacles close in. The pace steadily increases, testing your reflexes and control with every passing moment. Staying alive means mastering timing, patience, and precision.
